name: Evanescia
desc: One season the Phantasmoon waxes full, one season the mortal world shifts anew: The mysterious girl reappears in Planarcadia!\nFallen petals scatter with ease, and her stay was but a fleeting instant. Everything about this new era enthralls her, and she will not allow anyone to bring it to ruin...\nA single ruler blade judges right from wrong, but who can say how much good or evil lies within oneself?

1.name: Home: A Prayer in Dance
1.desc: Increases All-Type RES PEN by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. After "Master Fox" uses an attack, additionally triggers 1 instance of Elation Skill. Elation Skill additionally grants this unit <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "<u>Certified Banger</u>" point(s).

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

2.name: Voyage: A Wish for Everbloom
2.desc: CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When triggering the Certified Banger gain effect from the Trace "Watch All Revels"/"Best All Blooms", additionally gains "<u>Certified Banger</u>" equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of the "<u>Certified Banger</u>" gained this time.

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

3.name: Blade: A Feast on Evils
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Meadow: A Ruin by Vice
4.desc: Evanescia's DMG dealt ignores <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the enemy targets' DEF.

5.name: Arcadia: A Glimpse of Fates
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Maiden: A Step into Dreams
6.desc: The duration of Evanescia's "<u>Certified Banger</u>" increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). The <u>Elation DMG</u> dealt by Evanescia <u>merrymakes</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. For every <unbreak>100</unbreak> points of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" held, it additionally <u>merrymakes</u> by <unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak>. Up to <unbreak>1000</unbreak> points of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" can be taken into account. After using Ultimate for the first time upon entering combat, regenerates a fixed amount of <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy for Evanescia. This effect can trigger 1 time for every <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> more instances of Ultimate used.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

30000011.name: Merrymake
30000011.desc: A special effect that affects Elation DMG and can additionally boost Elation DMG dealt.

150501.name: Syllabus: Pop Quiz
150501.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Evanescia's ATK to one designated enemy.
150501.simple_desc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one designated enemy.

150502.name: Discipline: Final Verdict
150502.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Evanescia's ATK to one designated enemy and Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Evanescia's ATK to adjacent targets. Additionally gains <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u>.
150502.simple_desc: Deals massive Physical DMG to one enemy and Physical DMG to adjacent targets. Additionally gains <u>Punchline</u>.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

150503.name: Swordsong: Absolution Denied
150503.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Evanescia's ATK to all enemy targets, then deals 5 instances of DMG, with each instance dealing Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Evanescia's ATK to one random enemy.
150503.simple_desc: Deals Physical DMG to all enemies. Then, deals Physical DMG to one random enemy, bouncing a total of 5 times.

150504.name: Youth: Halcyon Evermore
150504.desc:
Evanescia gains Elation equal to <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of CRIT DMG. When Evanescia gains Energy, she will simultaneously gain an equal amount of "<u>Certified Banger</u>." When Evanescia gains "<u>Certified Banger</u>," she will simultaneously gain an equal amount of Energy. The amount of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" taken into calculation via this method cannot exceed <unbreak>100</unbreak> points in a single instance.
After accumulating <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Energy, she consumes this accumulation of <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>, and "Master Fox" launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies, and regenerates <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy for Evanescia. Each instance of Energy regeneration grants up to an accumulation of <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>. While Evanescia holds "<u>Certified Banger</u>":
Using Skill can deal <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[f1]%</unbreak></color> Physical <u>Elation DMG</u> to the attacked enemy targets.
Using Ultimate can deal <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> Physical <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies and also deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color> Physical <u>Elation DMG</u> to the enemy targets that have been randomly dealt DMG by Ultimate. When Ultimate deals <u>Elation DMG</u>, the amount of "<u>Certified Banger</u>" taken into account is at least equal to Max Energy.
Master Fox's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> Physical <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies.
150504.simple_desc: When Evanescia gains Energy, she will simultaneously <color=#f29e38ff>gain an equal amount of "<u>Certified Banger</u>"</color>. When Evanescia gains "<u>Certified Banger</u>," she will simultaneously <color=#f29e38ff>gain an equal amount of Energy</color>. After a certain amount of Energy is accumulated, "Master Fox" launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing minor Physical DMG to all enemies, and regenerates Energy for Evanescia. While Evanescia holds "<u>Certified Banger</u>," using Skill, Ultimate, or Master Fox's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> can deal minor Physical <u>Elation DMG</u> to enemies.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

150506.name: Attack
150506.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

150507.name: Petalfall: Floral Reminiscence
150507.desc: Immediately attacks all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, deals Physical DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Evanescia's ATK to all enemies and gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "<u>Certified Banger</u>."
150507.simple_desc: Immediately attacks all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, deals minor Physical DMG to all enemies and gains "<u>Certified Banger</u>".

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

150520.name: Scarlet: Elation or Execution
150520.desc: Deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> Physical <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies and additionally gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "<u>Certified Banger</u>".
150520.simple_desc: Deals massive Physical <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies and additionally gains "<u>Certified Banger</u>."

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. 1.point_desc: Increases Evanescia's CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When there are (≥3)/2/1 enemy target(s) on the field, the Ultimate's bounce count increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>. When a teammate with an Elation Skill Participant ID lower than Evanescia's gains "<u>Certified Banger</u>," Evanescia converts <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of it into her own "<u>Certified Banger</u>."

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

1.point_desc: When "Master Fox" uses an attack, it additionally inflicts Vulnerability on the target, increasing the DMG they take by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
When a teammate's "<u>Certified Banger</u>" ends, Evanescia converts <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of it into her own "<u>Certified Banger</u>."

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.
